name: Switch between organization via UI
description:
- Login with valid credentials.
- Create new organization via **API**.
- Create second organization via UI.

### Verify that:

- User can switch between organizations.
descriptionHtml:
• Login with valid credentials.
  • Create new organization via API.
  • Create second organization via UI.

Verify that:

  • User can switch between organizations.
